title: Design System: 辽港伐谋知识管理平台

display.purpose: Page titles and logo — Noto Serif SC authoritative serif

body.purpose: Standard body text — Noto Sans SC at 13px/1.5

label.purpose: Table headers, metadata — uppercase JetBrains Mono 11px

mono.purpose: KO IDs, version strings, technical values — JetBrains Mono 10-11px

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Modal dialog only. Cards and panels are flat.

shadows.name: timeline-node
shadows.purpose: Timeline node ring to separate node from connecting line.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Prefer exponential ease-out for interactive elements. No bounce.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default primary action button. Port blue background, white text, 2px radius.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #0F4C75; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 2px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1E6A9D; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ED8936; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Default secondary button. White background, border, dark text.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #fff; color: #1A2332; border: 1px solid #DCE0E6; border-radius: 2px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #EEF2F7; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ED8936; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Warn Button
components.description: High-attention or destructive action button. Signal orange background.
components.css: .ds-btn-warn { background: #ED8936; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 2px; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-warn:hover { background: #C26418; } .ds-btn-warn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ED8936; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: KO ID Tag
components.description: Monospace KO identifier shown in tables and detail views. Port blue text on light blue-gray background.
components.css: .ds-ko-id { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #0F4C75; background: #EEF2F7; border-radius: 2px; padding: 1px 6px; }

components.name: Status Tag - Hard
components.description: Hard constraint status tag. Red background, white text.
components.css: .ds-tag-hard { background: #FED7D7; color: #C53030; border-radius: 2px; padding: 1px 6px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; }

components.name: Status Tag - Soft
components.description: Soft constraint status tag. Orange-tinted background.
components.css: .ds-tag-soft { background: #FEEBC8; color: #C26418; border-radius: 2px; padding: 1px 6px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 11px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content card. White background, 1px border, 2px radius, no shadow.
components.html:
卡片标题
卡片内容区域
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #DCE0E6; border-radius: 2px; padding: 16px; } .ds-card-header { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #1A2332; padding-bottom: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #DCE0E6; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 13px; color: #5A6373; }

components.name: Data Table
components.description: Standard data table. Collapsed borders, JetBrains Mono for IDs, 2px radius wrapper.
components.html:
对象 ID标题状态
KO-CON-0004即到即靠约束Hard
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 12px; table-layout: auto; } .ds-table th { text-align: left; padding: 8px 10px; background: #FAFBFC; border-bottom: 1px solid #DCE0E6; font-weight: 500; color: #5A6373; font-size: 11px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.04em; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; } .ds-table td { padding: 9px 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid #ECEEF1; color: #1A2332; } .ds-table tr:hover td { background: #FAFBFC; }

components.name: Navigation Rail Item
components.description: Nav item in the dark rail. Icon + label + count, left 2px orange border when active.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 9px 16px; color: #8FA0B5; font-size: 13px; cursor: pointer; border-left: 2px solid transparent; transition: all 0.1s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #fff; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); } .ds-nav-item-active { color: #fff; background: #173552; border-left-color: #ED8936; } .ds-nav-icon { font-size: 11px; color: #ED8936; width: 14px; text-align: center; } .ds-nav-count { margin-left: auto; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 10px; color: #8FA0B5; } .ds-nav-item-active .ds-nav-count { color: #ED8936; }

components.name: Modal Dialog
components.description: Standard modal dialog. Paper white, shadow, 2px radius.
components.html:
对话框标题

对话框内容
components.css: .ds-modal-overlay { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index: 1000; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; } .ds-modal { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #DCE0E6; border-radius: 2px; width: min(480px, 92vw); box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .ds-modal-header { padding: 14px 18px; border-bottom: 1px solid #DCE0E6; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; background: #FAFBFC; } .ds-modal-header h3 { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #1A2332; } .ds-modal-close { cursor: pointer; font-size: 18px; color: #8A92A0; background: none; border: none; } .ds-modal-body { padding: 18px; } .ds-modal-footer { padding: 12px 18px; border-top: 1px solid #DCE0E6; display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; background: #FAFBFC; }

components.name: Toast Notification
components.description: Toast notification with left accent bar. Stacked bottom-right.
components.html:
✓
操作完成
约束已通过审核
components.css: .ds-toast { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 14px; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #DCE0E6; border-radius: 2px; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); min-width: 280px; max-width: 400px; position: relative; } .ds-toast::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 3px; height: 100%; border-radius: 2px 0 0 2px; } .ds-toast-success::before { background: #2F855A; } .ds-toast-success .ds-toast-icon { color: #2F855A; } .ds-toast-error::before { background: #C53030; } .ds-toast-error .ds-toast-icon { color: #C53030; } .ds-toast-warning::before { background: #ED8936; } .ds-toast-warning .ds-toast-icon { color: #ED8936; } .ds-toast-info::before { background: #0F4C75; } .ds-toast-info .ds-toast-icon { color: #0F4C75; } .ds-toast-icon { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; width: 18px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-toast-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; } .ds-toast-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #1A2332; } .ds-toast-msg { font-size: 12px; color: #5A6373; margin-top: 2px; } .ds-toast-close { cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; color: #8A92A0; background: none; border: none; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Form Input
components.description: Standard text input. White background, 1px border, 2px radius.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="输入知识对象名称...">
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 6px 10px; border: 1px solid #DCE0E6; border-radius: 2px; font-family: 'Noto Sans SC', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #1A2332; background: #fff; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8A92A0; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #0F4C75; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(15,76,117,0.1); }

components.name: KO Type Dot
components.description: 8x8px colored square indicating KO type. Color-coded per type system.
components.css: .ds-dot { display: inline-block; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 2px; } .ds-dot-con { background: #C53030; } .ds-dot-par { background: #2F855A; } .ds-dot-ont { background: #6B46C1; } .ds-dot-rul { background: #ED8936; } .ds-dot-prm { background: #FBB6CE; } .ds-dot-doc { background: #8A92A0; }

narrative.overview: A living archive of operational wisdom for dock operations experts at 1440p workstations. Dense, functional, industrial. The platform serves long-running data-intensive sessions where errors are costly and clarity is safety. Every pixel earns its place. Not a SaaS dashboard, not an AI startup prototype — a professional instrument panel for port optimization.
keyCharacteristics: Dark rail navigation with orange active indicator establishes control-panel authority
KO type color system consistently applied across dots, badges, and type tags
2px border-radius throughout — sharp, professional, not consumer-app soft
Flat by default — shadows only on elevated elements (modals, toasts)
JetBrains Mono for all technical identifiers: KO IDs, version strings, parameter values
Data density is intentional — tables show 9 columns when the workflow requires it
Precheck panel surfaces conflicts before rendering — error prevention is structural

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only on elevated elements (modals, toasts, overlays). Cards and stat panels use borders, not drop shadows.

rules.name: The Density-is-a-Feature Rule
rules.body: This is not a consumer-grade simplified UI. Tables show 9 columns. Navigation shows KO type counts. The information density is intentional. Do not strip data from tables to make it 'cleaner'.

rules.name: The Mono-Over-Mono Rule
rules.body: Technical identifiers (KO IDs, version strings, parameter values) are always JetBrains Mono. Body text, even when technical, uses Noto Sans SC unless it is an identifier.

rules.name: The KO Color Rule
rules.body: All six KO types have a consistent color assignment. Color is always paired with text label and icon shape, never color alone (colorblind accessibility).

rules.name: The No-Guesswork-About-State Rule
rules.body: KO status, conflict level, version number always legible. Never ambiguous. The expert trusts the instrument panel, not inference.

dos: Do use dark rail navigation with orange active indicator
Do show KO type counts in the nav sub-menu
Do use JetBrains Mono for all technical identifiers
Do use the KO type color system consistently
Do pair color with text label and icon shape on conflict indicators
Do use table-layout: auto for data tables
Do show the precheck panel before rendering
Do use the triage panel layout for knowledge governance
donts: Don't use pastel cards with rounded-everything
Don't use dark theme with neon accents
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as colored accent on cards
Don't use identical card grids for KO type entries
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section
Don't use numbered section markers as default scaffolding
Don't use display: block on table cell elements
Don't use max-width: 0 on table cells
Don't show the tweaks panel in production
